name: The Bogey Factory
address: 503 W Verona Ave Suite 400, Verona, WI 53593
about: The Bogey Factory is an indoor golf simulator facility located in Verona, Wisconsin, that combines high-fidelity golf simulation with a full-service sports bar and dining experience. The venue utilizes premium TrackMan iO technology to provide players with accurate ball and club tracking across a variety of world-renowned golf courses. It offers a range of amenities including event hosting, league play, memberships, and on-site food and beverage service, making it a versatile destination for both casual golfers and serious players.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan iO simulator technology for accurate performance tracking
Full-service bar and dining menu available on-site
Versatile space suitable for both casual rounds and serious practice sessions
Multiple simulator bays available for private or group play
Host to leagues, events, and tournaments for a competitive social scene

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service kitchen with a menu featuring appetizers, burgers, wraps, bowls, and entrees.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor with radar-based ball and club tracking technology.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Players can bring their own clubs or rent them on-site. The Bogey Factory offers club rentals for convenience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted as The Bogey Factory offers a full-service kitchen and bar on-site.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round typically take?
faq.answer: An 18-hole round on a simulator typically takes between 2 to 3 hours depending on player pace and course complexity.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Bogey Factory is kid-friendly, offering mini-games on the simulators and a menu suitable for children, making it a fun option for families.
